notes: MaxFit (performance gym, Williamsburg VA - rare visit). 4K 120fps (massive files, not to be repeated). Round iron, perfect diagonal angle, low distractions BUT lots of black (dark iron + black clothing/mat/wall) = low-contrast dark-iron flow-texture challenge at high res. Wk1 hypertrophy, low RPE, easy pacing (shallow non-clean loss curve).

notes: Bench 225lb x10, dark Rogue DEEP-DISH iron + blue hub, head-on rack view (lifter un/reracks the bar). FIXED 2026-06-16: the un/rerack horizontal transit USED to over-count (BN-4/5=11) + tank last-rep velocity; horizontal-aware merge + transit gate (VideoConfig.transit_aware, tap path) -> reps_cv 10 EXACT, conf 1.0. Velocity via human-confirmed RIM (deep-dish 45 ~570px vs the 72px hub = 7x scale error): abs MV RMSE 0.071 vs Vitruve (SB 0.027); VL 39% vs Vit 42%. Mean abs over the 5: ours 0.040 ~ SB 0.039 (tied). Plates: set1 2x45, sets2-5 a 10+25 in front of one deep-dish 45. Westwood Athletics.
